author: vladimir_ea
content: Is this really the design? Builders must subscribe to all attestation subnets in order to determine when they can release the payload? What about the legendary ‘unsophisticated builder’?

author: potuz
content: As soon as you see a block with your bid, releasing the Payload immediately is safe from same slot unbundling because the attestation deadline is passed so even an equivocation should be reorged. There are attacks that may still be successful but not same slot unbundling at least
